ab: Namakua asu maipa ki langqa’?
en: How do you go to the block-house?

ab: Natunlaihlih caak maipa ki langqa’.
en: I drive to the block-house.

ab: Namakua ka cia maipa ki ising?
en: How does he go to the hospital?

ab: Tananak a cia munising.
en: He walks to the hospital.

ab: Namakua ka asu maipa ki paunghu?
en: How do you go to Penghu?

ab: Natunkusbabai caak maipa ki paunghu.
en: I go to Penghu by plane.

ab: Namakua ka asu maipa ki paunghu?
en: How do you go to Penghu?

ab: Natunqatu’ azak maipa ki paunghu.
en: I go to Penghu by boat.

ab: Nama’az ca daza’an su’u mulumaq?
en: How do you go home?

ab: Tunlaihlihtingki’ azak mulumaq.
en: I go home by MRT.

ab: Ma’az ca daza’an it Ival muncan i sipulan?
en: How does panay go to school?

ab: Tunlaihlihsapuz at Ival muncan i sipulan.
en: panay goes to school by train.

ab: Ma’az ca daza’an it Balan muncan i sumsuman?
en: How does kacaw go to church?

ab: Tunlaihlihpaqaqais at Balan muncan i sumsuman.
en: kacaw goes to church by bicycle.

ab: Tunlaihlihtingki’ asu muncan i sipulan?
en: Do you go to school by MRT?

ab: Nii, tunlaihlihqaungu azak muncan i sipulan.
en: No, I go to school by bus.

ab: Tunlaihlihpaqaqais asu muncan i sipulan?
en: Do you go to school by bicycle?

ab: Uu, tunlaihlihpaqaqais azak muncan i sipulan.
en: Yes, I go to school by bicycle.

ab: Tunlaihlihtukhiv asu muncan i takau?
en: Do you go to Kaohsiung by High Speed Rail?

ab: Uu, tunlaihlihtukhiv azak muncan i takau.
en: Yes, I go to Kaohsiung by High Speed Rail.

ab: Tunlaihlihsapuz cina tunkusbabai asu muncan i taitu’?
ch: A:你去台東搭火車還是搭飛機?
en: Are you going to Taitung by train or by plane?

ab: Tunkusbabai azak, maupa’i cia tu tunkusbabai ca mahiav i tunlaihlihsapuz.
ch: B:我搭飛機，搭飛機比搭火車快。
en: I will take the plane because it is faster than the train.

ab: Tunlaihlihqaungu cina maunting asu laihlih ca muncan i sumsuman?
ch: A:你去教會搭公車還是開車?
en: Are you going to drive to the church or take the bus?

ab: Maunting azak laihlih ca muncan i sumsuman, maupa’i cia tu untinglaihlih ca macial i tunlaihlihqaungu.
ch: B:我開車去教會，開車比搭公車方便。
en: I will drive to the church because it is more convenient than the bus.

ab: Machuan i lumaq muu ca babalivan?
en: Is the market close to your house?

ab: Nii tu machuan, tunlaihlihpukpuk azak muncan i babalivan.
ch: B:不近，我都騎摩托車去超市。
en: No, it is not, so I always ride the motorcycle to the market.

ab: Machuan i sipulan ca panada’aspaitasan?
en: Is the post office close to the school?

ab: Machuan hala, suhanin ta ca tananak.
en: Yes, it is within walking distance.

ab: Machuan i ul’uanlaihlih ca kakaunan?
en: Is the restaurant close to the station?

ab: maca mintasalin han i ul’uanlaihlai ha, Muqnang hima kinulutan sin’udanan na suha’annin ta.
ch: B:出車站再走五分鐘就到了。
en: It only takes five minutes after you walk out of the station.
